title: Light premium data monument
prompt: Create a 16:9 light premium editorial data monument for TSI. Three large abstract numeric blocks as sculptural proof-point objects, but do not use exact readable digits if avoidable; make them feel like placeholder synthetic metrics. White and cool blue-white foundation with subtle warm editorial panels, TSI dark blue #001E41 structure, TSI bright blue #4396F6 highlights, tiny green progress details, restrained orange exception accent. Premium, subtle, executive, clean negative space, suitable for a deck proof slide or web section. Leave upper-left logo-safe space. No logos, no fake client/account/patient data, no watermarks, no aggressive debt imagery.
notes: Proof-point visual lane; use final verified metrics outside the generated image.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
